feature_name: Remove Shopify links and optimize page load
scope_summary: Replace all Shopify store links with local Dopamine Depot landing page (store cancelled). Remove 52KB divergipedia-data.js from non-divergipedia pages to improve load time. No functional changes to existing features.

legal_and_regulatory.rationale: No new legal exposure. Removing a dead external link to a cancelled Shopify store. No new claims added.
evidence: No new external service dependencies introduced

privacy_local_first_promise.rationale: Removes an external link (Shopify). Replaces with local page. Net improvement to privacy posture.
evidence: All Dopamine Depot links now point to /dopamine-depot.html on the same domain

medical_scope_and_claims.rationale: No medical content changed. Merch page copy contains no health claims.
evidence: Dopamine Depot page describes merch only

behavioral_science_alignment.rationale: No behavioral changes. Page load optimization reduces friction.

neurodivergence_research_alignment.rationale: No ND-related content changed. Merch page and navigation updates only.
evidence: No changes to field notes, divergipedia, or app content

user_benefit_and_harm_check.rationale: Users no longer land on a dead Shopify store. Pages load faster. Clear messaging that store is being rebuilt.
evidence: Dopamine Depot page now shows coming-soon with waitlist CTA

brand_voice_and_claims.rationale: New Dopamine Depot copy matches existing brand voice. No hype, no false urgency.
evidence: Copy: 'The store is being rebuilt with new designs and a simpler checkout.'

accessibility_and_inclusion.rationale: No accessibility regressions. Replaced external links with internal ones (no new tab confusion).
evidence: Removed target=_blank from Dopamine Depot links

security_and_reliability.rationale: Removed external dependency (Shopify domain). Reduced JS payload. No new scripts or services.
evidence: Net reduction: 52KB JS removed from 11 pages, 1 external domain removed

monetization_and_dark_pattern_check.rationale: No monetization changes. Store link replaced with informational page and optional waitlist. No coercive CTA.
evidence: CTA is 'Join the waitlist' — voluntary, no countdown, no pressure

ship_decision.conditions: All filters pass. Low-risk infrastructure change with net positive for users.
